channel.title: Economics of Carbon Capture, Use, & Storage
channel.description: Recent content on Economics of Carbon Capture, Use, & Storage

item.title: Projects
item.description: The team will produce peer-reviewed scholarly working papers and publications, new datasets and models, host workshops, and engage in public outreach efforts to translate our research for stakeholders in the policy community in the four following research areas: What is the effect of policy uncertainty on CCUS infrastructure investments, how do the effects of uncertainty depend on risk management and risk aversion among infrastructure investors, and how can policy design navigate the tradeoffs between policy commitment and policy flexibility?
